core.name: core
core.notes: Assumes the base PyTorch stack is provided by the editable TorchLens install.

mmlab.name: mmlab
post_install_commands: SP=$(python -c "import sysconfig;print(sysconfig.get_paths()['purelib'])") && printf '%s\n' 'try:' '    import mmcv as _m' '    if getattr(_m, "__version__", "") == "2.2.0": _m.__version__ = "2.1.0"' 'except Exception:' '    pass' > "$SP/sitecustomize.py"
mmlab.post_install_check: import torchlens, mmengine, mmcv, mmdet, mmseg, mmpretrain; print('mmcv', mmcv.__version__)
mmlab.notes: SOLVED (empirically verified): torch 2.4.1 + mmcv 2.2.0 wheel; sitecustomize spoofs mmcv.__version__->2.1.0 so mmdet/mmseg conservative <2.2.0 cap passes (2.2.0 additive-only). numpy<2 for ABI. mim installs .mim/configs the recipes reference. mmpose/mmocr need separate envs (own caps/deps). Proven: RetinaNet/FCOS/FCN/PSPNet/DeepLabV3/SegFormer/ResNet50 instantiate+trace.

detectron2.name: detectron2
detectron2.notes: Built from the upstream git repository against the environment torch build.

paddle.name: paddle
paddle.notes: GPU Paddle stack for PaddleSeg and PaddleClas zoos.

fla.name: fla
fla.notes: GPU recipe; requires CUDA and Triton support.

effdet.name: effdet
effdet.notes: effdet 0.4.1 (rwightman); pulls timm/omegaconf/pycocotools (manylinux wheels). torch floor 1.12.

espnet.name: espnet
espnet.notes: espnet 202511; torch>=1.11 no cap; pure-pip (no Kaldi). sentencepiece==0.2.0 pin -> isolate; never co-install w/ nemo/speechbrain.

speechbrain.name: speechbrain
speechbrain.notes: speechbrain 1.1.0; torch>=2.1 clean. k2 optional via HF wheel URL; flair plain pip. transformers>=4.30 -> isolate from nemo. (TorchLens patch_detached __file__ bug fixed in f07db5b0/39a3135f.)

basicsr.name: basicsr
basicsr.notes: basicsr-fixed 1.4.2 (plain basicsr import-fails on torchvision>=0.17). Fallback: basicsr==1.4.2 + sed patch functional_tensor->functional.

ppocr.name: ppocr
ppocr.notes: Pin paddleocr 2.10.0 (3.x needs paddlepaddle>=3.0, breaks 2.6.2). Coexists w/ paddleseg/paddleclas; watch opencv collision.

ppdet.name: ppdet
ppdet.notes: git install (PyPI paddledet pins numpy<1.24+sklearn==0.0+opencv<=4.6). SEPARATE env from ppocr (opencv). import module = ppdet.

dgl.name: dgl
dgl.notes: DGL CUDA wheels only at data.dgl.ai/wheels/torch-2.4/cu121; use 2.5.0+cu121 (2.4.0 rejects torch 2.4.1, #7883). Pinned torch 2.4.1 (no torch>=2.5 cu121 dgl wheels).

nemo.name: nemo
nemo.notes: NeMo 2.4.0 [asr] pinned torch 2.4.1 (2.7.x needs torch>=2.6). NEVER [all]. If runtime hits 2.5/2.6 APIs, bump torch 2.6 + nemo 2.7.3.

gan.name: gan
gan.post_install_check: import torchlens; from pytorch_pretrained_biggan import BigGAN; from stylegan2_pytorch import ModelLoader
gan.notes: BigGAN(HF port)+StyleGAN2(lucidrains)+lukemelas wrapper. SinGAN/ConSinGAN/StyleGAN2-ADA/CycleGAN = reimplement-as-classic (no setup.py).

pykeen.name: pykeen
pykeen.post_install_check: import torchlens, pykeen; from pykeen.models import TransE
pykeen.notes: PyKEEN knowledge-graph embedding models. Latest PyPI release observed: 1.11.1.

spikingjelly.name: spikingjelly
spikingjelly.post_install_check: import torchlens, spikingjelly; from spikingjelly.activation_based import neuron, functional
spikingjelly.notes: Stable PyPI SpikingJelly release. Catalog rows were previously verified with 0.0.0.0.14.

compressai.name: compressai
compressai.post_install_check: import torchlens, compressai; from compressai.models import ScaleHyperprior
compressai.notes: CompressAI learned image-compression models. PyPI notes support Python 3.8+ and PyTorch 1.7+.

e3nn.name: e3nn
e3nn.post_install_check: import torchlens, e3nn; from e3nn import o3; o3.Linear('1x0e', '1x0e')
e3nn.notes: e3nn 0.6.0 is current on PyPI and requires PyTorch >=2.2. torch-geometric is included for e3nn gate_points catalog rows.

mmpose.name: mmpose
post_install_commands: SP=$(python -c "import sysconfig;print(sysconfig.get_paths()['purelib'])") && printf '%s\n' 'try:' '    import mmcv as _m' '    if getattr(_m, "__version__", "") == "2.2.0": _m.__version__ = "2.1.0"' 'except Exception:' '    pass' > "$SP/sitecustomize.py"
mmpose.post_install_check: import torchlens, mmengine, mmcv, mmdet, mmpose; print('mmcv', mmcv.__version__)
mmpose.notes: OpenMMLab pose env. Mirrors mmlab's mmcv 2.2.0->2.1.0 sitecustomize spoof even though mmpose 1.3.2 itself permits mmcv <=3.0.0.

mmocr.name: mmocr
post_install_commands: SP=$(python -c "import sysconfig;print(sysconfig.get_paths()['purelib'])") && printf '%s\n' 'try:' '    import mmcv as _m' '    if getattr(_m, "__version__", "") == "2.2.0": _m.__version__ = "2.1.0"' 'except Exception:' '    pass' > "$SP/sitecustomize.py"
mmocr.post_install_check: import torchlens, mmengine, mmcv, mmdet, mmocr; print('mmcv', mmcv.__version__, 'mmdet', mmdet.__version__)
mmocr.notes: OpenMMLab OCR env. MMOCR 1.0.1 requires mmcv <2.2.0 and mmdet <3.2.0, so mmdet is pinned to 3.1.0 and the mmlab mmcv version spoof is reused.

openhgnn.name: openhgnn
openhgnn.notes: OpenHGNN 0.7.0 with the same DGL torch-2.4/cu121 wheel source as the existing dgl env.

thuml_tslib.name: thuml_tslib
thuml_tslib.post_install_check: import torchlens; from models.TimesNet import Model as TimesNet; from models.iTransformer import Model as ITransformer
thuml_tslib.notes: THUML Time-Series-Library is not pip-installable: the repo has no setup.py/pyproject.toml and the PyPI 'tslib' package is unrelated. This recipe clones the repo into $CONDA_PREFIX/src and exposes it with a .pth file.

detrex.name: detrex
detrex.notes: detrex has no PyPI distribution, but pip can build metadata from IDEA-Research/detrex. Includes detectron2 because detrex docs install it first and detrex uses Detectron2 infrastructure.

neuralforecast.name: neuralforecast
neuralforecast.post_install_check: import torchlens, neuralforecast; from neuralforecast.models import NBEATS, NHITS, TimesNet
neuralforecast.notes: Nixtla NeuralForecast time-series models. Current PyPI release observed: 3.1.9.

lightly.name: lightly
lightly.post_install_check: import torchlens, lightly; from lightly.models.modules import SimCLRProjectionHead
lightly.notes: Lightly self-supervised learning heads. Current PyPI release observed: 1.5.25.

uniformer.name: uniformer
uniformer.post_install_check: import torchlens, slowfast; from slowfast.config.defaults import get_cfg
uniformer.notes: Sense-X UniFormer video_classification subdirectory installs as the slowfast package via setup.py. The plain 'uniform' PyPI package is unrelated.

mace.name: mace
mace.post_install_check: import torchlens, mace, e3nn; from mace.modules import models as mace_models
mace.notes: e3nn-adjacent optional family. mace-torch 0.3.16 is pip-installable and depends on e3nn==0.4.4. torch-points3d was not selected because its current wheel metadata requires torch<2.0, numpy<1.20, and old PyG extensions.

fat_generative_representation_core.name: fat_generative_representation_core
fat_generative_representation_core.notes: Generative/representation core split from FLA because FLA needs torch>=2.7 and triton>=3.3.
fat_generative_representation_core.post_install_check: import torchlens, transformers, diffusers, compressai, basicsr, lightly, spikingjelly; from pytorch_pretrained_biggan import BigGAN; from stylegan2_pytorch import ModelLoader; print('generative core ok')

fat_generative_representation_fla_torch2.name: fat_generative_representation_fla_torch27
fat_generative_representation_fla_torch2.notes: FLA side env. Its current metadata/docs require torch>=2.7 with triton>=3.3, so it cannot share the torch 2.4.1 fat env.
fat_generative_representation_fla_torch2.post_install_check: import torchlens, torch, triton, fla; print(torch.__version__, triton.__version__)

fat_graph_geometric_pyg_molecular.name: fat_graph_geometric_pyg_molecular
fat_graph_geometric_pyg_molecular.notes: PyG/KG/molecular split. MACE pins e3nn==0.4.4, so this env intentionally does not request e3nn==0.6.0.
fat_graph_geometric_pyg_molecular.post_install_check: import torchlens, torch_geometric, pykeen, e3nn, mace, schnetpack; from pykeen.models import TransE; from mace.modules import models as mace_models; print('pyg/molecular ok')

fat_speech_audio_espnet.name: fat_speech_audio_espnet
fat_speech_audio_espnet.notes: ESPnet split from NeMo/SpeechBrain because espnet==202511 requires numpy>=2.
fat_speech_audio_espnet.post_install_check: import torchlens, torchaudio, espnet2; print('espnet ok')

fat_speech_audio_nemo.name: fat_speech_audio_nemo
fat_speech_audio_nemo.notes: Speech env for NeMo ASR, SpeechBrain, and torchaudio. Separate from ESPnet because NeMo needs numpy<2.
fat_speech_audio_nemo.post_install_check: import torchlens, torchaudio, speechbrain, nemo.collections.asr; print('nemo/speechbrain ok')

fat_tabular_recsys.name: fat_tabular_recsys
fat_tabular_recsys.notes: Tabular/recsys env. numpy<2 is required by pytorch-widedeep 1.7.0.
fat_tabular_recsys.post_install_check: import torchlens, recbole, deepctr_torch, pytorch_widedeep, fuxictr; print('tabular/recsys ok')

fat_time_series.name: fat_time_series
fat_time_series.notes: Time-series env with Torch/TorchVision force-reinstall after resolver-heavy installs to prevent torchvision::nms drift.
fat_time_series.post_install_check: import torchlens, neuralforecast, gluonts; from models.TimesNet import Model as TimesNet; from models.iTransformer import Model as ITransformer; print('time series ok')
post_install_commands: python -m pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps torch==2.4.1 torchvision==0.19.1 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121

fat_vision_detection_core.name: fat_vision_detection_core
fat_vision_detection_core.notes: Vision core split from Detectron2/Detrex and UniFormer because those source builds need custom install handling.
fat_vision_detection_core.post_install_check: import torchlens, torch, torchvision, timm, segmentation_models_pytorch, ultralytics, effdet, monai, open_clip; print(torch.__version__, torchvision.__version__)

special_lerobot_py312.name: special_lerobot_py312
special_lerobot_py312.notes: LeRobot 0.5.1 requires Python>=3.12 and torch>=2.7, so it remains a special env.
